---

## Pattern or behavior

Describe the phrase, structure, or behavior you want to detect.

## Why it looks automated or unsolicited

Explain what makes this a good signal.

## False-positive risk

What legitimate email might this accidentally catch?

## Example

Use fake or anonymized text only.
